message:
test(scheduler): power-of-two stealing preference and local-only fallback

Add 2 tests for the power-of-two-choices work stealing algorithm:

1. test_power_of_two_prefers_heavier_queue: verify that when two
   candidate queues are sampled, the stealer picks from the one
   with more enqueued tasks.

2. test_power_of_two_falls_back_when_primary_is_local_only: verify
   that when the heavier queue contains only local-affinity tasks
   (non-stealable), the stealer falls back to the secondary queue
   and successfully steals from it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
